goals: Explore the project structure to understand what kind of codebase this is
Find relevant files related to analytics, tracking, or engagement features
Search for specific functionality related to paid promotions or user engagement

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and practical. Likes to understand how things work under the hood.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows about social media marketing and paid promotions but has limited technical background in codebases.

end_condition: The user has explored the codebase structure and found relevant files related to their interests
